inspection.notes: Reviewed the authored video sequence, continuous 4% live replacement, 50% live state, and final two-claimant labels. Browser-tested video-first entry, explicit exploration, continuous control, replay, runtime-loss fallback, visible reconnect, successful reconnection, and the in-page identity-claims anchor. Confirmed the learner interface contains no runtime-mechanics paragraph or visible mode/status pills in either video or live state. Removed query strings from local asset paths for direct file loading, hide live-only controls in direct-file mode, and losslessly remuxed the exact H.264 fallback with MP4 metadata first; decoded frame hashes match before and after. The example's stylesheet is workspace-specific and is not distributed as Lumanim's design. Concurrent lesson, reference, and live-frame requests returned HTTP 200; warm live frames completed in roughly 4–7 ms.
